title: Teyma' #8485
definition:
Tema = "desert"

 n pr m
 1) the 9th son of Ishmael

 n pr loc
 2) the land settled by Tema the son of Ishmael
nasbUsage:

 n pr m
 1) the 9th son of Ishmael

 n pr loc
 2) the land settled by Tema the son of Ishmael
